foo.mass-1: — a new tournament from IQ Option, where you can not only win a share of the $10 000 prize fund,
foo.mass-o: but get a chance to become our VIP client for 2 weeks!
foo.mass-2: Enjoy the service of your personal trading consultant, exclusive educational materials and more!
foo.pool: 75% of your payments during the tournament will go to the prize pool! All participating traders will start the tournament with a special account with a balance of $1,000 USD
foo.star: *One will get a share of the prize fund only in case of winning the tournament. ** 3 participants, selected from the list of winners using lottery, will be assigned a VIP client status for the total of 14 days.
